content.question:
Put the verbs in brackets into the correct future form.

1. Ring your mother or she ___ (worry).

Put the verbs in brackets into the correct future form.

2. Look at that tree! It ___ (fall) down!

Put the verbs in brackets into the correct future form.

3. I'm sure I ___ (finish) this assignment by tomorrow.

Put the verbs in brackets into the correct future form.

4. We ___ (drive) to Manchester tonight. Would you like a lift?
content.answer: will be driving / are driving / are going to drive

content.question:
Put the verbs in brackets into the correct future form.

5. It is expected that by the end of the day the jury ___ (reach) its verdict.

Put the verbs in brackets into the correct future form.

6. Put the bags down or you ___ (drop) the milk!

Put the verbs in brackets into the correct future form.

7. By October he ___ (be) a widower for ten years.

Put the verbs in brackets into the correct future form.

8. They ___ (leave) Heathrow by now and will be on their way to America.

Put the verbs in brackets into the correct future form.

9. Peter's very late for his meeting. It ___ (certainly / start) by now.

Put the verbs in brackets into the correct future form.

10. On 24th January she ___ (complete) half of her prison sentence.
